docket_entries.description: CKECK WAS ACCEPTED FOR $15.40, INSTEAD OF $25.30.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT CUSHING, JAMES RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT WALD, MICHAEL E,     C/O CHARLES N.
